keywords: BOLA ownership check gig accept lock SETNX OCC bid status OPEN GigAccepted GigAcceptanceFailed tenantId AsyncLocalStorage clientTenantId three guards
teachingPoint: T613 GigAcceptanceLockGateway enforces a 3-guard acceptance gate in strict ORDER: ORDER 1 = BOLA (gigPosting.clientTenantId === tenantId from ALS), ORDER 2 = SETNX gig-accept-lock:{gigId} (prevents concurrent double-acceptance), ORDER 3 = OCC bid status must be OPEN. All three must pass before GigAccepted is emitted. GigAcceptanceFailed is emitted on any guard violation.
ironRules: ORDER 1 BOLA check: gigPosting.clientTenantId must equal tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage — never from request payload
ORDER 2 SETNX: search for gig-accept-lock:{gigId} before creating — duplicate lock returns alreadyAccepted:true with no GigAccepted event
ORDER 3 OCC: bid.status must equal OPEN — any other status emits GigAcceptanceFailed with BID_NOT_OPEN
storeDocument(GIG_AUDIT_INDEX) MUST complete before enqueue(GigAccepted) — DNA-8 outbox pattern
GigAcceptanceFailed emitted on BOLA_VIOLATION, GIG_NOT_FOUND, BID_NOT_FOUND, BID_NOT_OPEN — all failure paths covered
